name: APOLLO-B patisiran ATTR cardiac amyloidosis trial
summary: A 12-month phase 3 randomized trial testing patisiran in hereditary or wild-type ATTR cardiac amyloidosis.
population: 360 patients with hereditary or wild-type ATTR cardiac amyloidosis

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Protein Aggregate Clearance because they can show whether the intervention changes function and safety in 360 patients with hereditary or wild-type ATTR cardiac amyloidosis. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
